summary: Notion AI is accelerating its enterprise readiness with significant API enhancements for advanced filtering and status property support, while aggressively expanding global sales and customer success teams to target mid-market and enterprise segments. Concurrently, the company is investing in AI security infrastructure and developer experience, signaling a strategic pivot toward scalable, secure, and deeply integrable AI-powered collaboration.

signals.title: notion-sdk-js v5.18.0 adds multi-value filters for select, status, and multi_select properties
signals.insight: Enables complex, dynamic database queries critical for enterprise automation and BI integrations, directly competing with Airtable and Coda on advanced data modeling capabilities.

signals.title: notion-sdk-js v5.17.0 adds markdown parameter to Create Comment endpoint
signals.insight: Allows rich, formatted AI-generated comments—key for enhancing AI assistant output quality and adoption in collaborative workflows against competitors like Microsoft Copilot in Teams.

signals.title: notion-sdk-js v5.14.0 adds status property support in API endpoints
signals.insight: Unlocks native workflow state management (e.g., 'In Review', 'Approved') without workarounds, strengthening Notion AI's position as an operational system of record versus static docs tools.

signals.title: Notion AI hiring Application Security Engineer, AI Security
signals.insight: Signals proactive investment in AI-specific threat modeling and red-teaming—critical for winning regulated enterprise deals where AI governance is a key differentiator vs. less secure rivals.

signals.title: Notion AI hiring Enterprise Account Executives across UK, DACH, AMER, and Asia
signals.insight: Demonstrates coordinated global go-to-market expansion targeting high-value enterprise accounts, directly challenging Asana, Monday.com, and ClickUp in verticalized sales motions.

signals.title: Notion AI hiring Manager, Scaled Customer Success and Enterprise CSMs
signals.insight: Indicates maturation beyond self-serve into high-touch, outcomes-based customer success—essential for reducing churn and increasing ACV in competitive enterprise land-and-expand plays.

signals.title: Notion AI hiring Product Marketing Manager, IT Solutions
signals.insight: Suggests dedicated focus on messaging and positioning for IT buyers—shifting from end-user productivity to infrastructure-grade collaboration, aligning with enterprise procurement cycles.

signals.title: New repo: pulumi-elasticstack-sdk
signals.insight: Reveals internal adoption of Elastic Stack for observability and log analytics—enabling better AI model monitoring and reliability, which underpins trust in production AI features against rivals with weaker telemetry.
